name: JAKKS PACIFIC INC
summary: JAKKS Pacific, Inc. is a multi-product line toy company that designs, produces, markets, sells, and distributes toys and consumer products including action figures, toy vehicles, dolls, costumes, ride-on products, outdoor activity toys, and kids furniture. The company licenses well-known IP from Disney, Nickelodeon, Nintendo, Sega, Marvel, and others, and sells through major retailers like Walmart and Target, with international sales of approximately $154.1 million in 2025.

products.name: Action Figures and Accessories
products.description: Licensed characters from Nintendo, Sonic the Hedgehog, The Simpsons, and proprietary brands like Creepy Crawlers.

products.name: Toy Vehicles
products.description: Includes Xtreme Power Dozer, Road Champs, Fly Wheels, and AirTitans inflatable remote-control dinosaur.

products.name: Dolls and Accessories
products.description: Small, large, fashion, and baby dolls based on Disney licenses and in-house brands like Perfectly Cute and KidTopia.

products.name: Foot-to-Floor Ride-On Products
products.description: Licensed from Bluey, Fisher-Price, Nickelodeon, and Hasbro; includes inflatable play environments and wagons.

products.name: Halloween and Everyday Costumes
products.description: Licensed and proprietary costumes for children, teens, and adults based on Super Mario, Harry Potter, Disney, and others.

products.name: Outdoor Activity Toys
products.description: Includes ReDo Skateboard Co., Sky Ball, SportsZone sport sets, and Wave Hoop under the Maui brand.

products.name: Kids Indoor/Outdoor Furniture
products.description: Activity trays, tables, room decor, and seasonal outdoor products based on Disney, Nickelodeon, and Hasbro licenses.

products.name: Board Games
products.description: Under JAKKS Wild Games brand, includes Temple Raider, K.O. Corral, and Galactic JAXX.

products.name: Role Play and Dress-Up Products
products.description: Based on Disney Frozen, Black & Decker, Disney Princess, Disney Encanto, and proprietary brands.

products.name: Private Label Products
products.description: Products developed exclusively for certain retail customers across various product categories.

partnerships.description: Licenses multiple Disney properties including Frozen, Princess, Encanto, Moana 2, ILY 4EVER, Pixar, and Minnie Mouse.
Licenses Nickelodeon IP for ride-on products and indoor/outdoor furniture.
Licenses Nintendo characters for action figures and accessories.
Licenses Sonic the Hedgehog franchise for action figures and accessories.
Licenses Hasbro brands for costumes, ride-on products, and furniture.
Licenses NBCUniversal IP including Minions and Universal's Wicked for costumes.
Licenses Microsoft's Halo brand for costumes.
Licenses WarnerMedia properties including Harry Potter for costumes and products.
Licenses Marvel IP for product lines.
Licenses Netflix IP for product lines.
Licenses Sony IP for product lines.
Licenses Bluey for foot-to-floor ride-on products.
Licenses PBS's Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood for infant and pre-school toys.
